name: ebay-lister-pro
description: Zero-dependency enterprise-grade Multi-Channel eBay Lister & Reseller Platform

scripts.healthcheck: node -e "const p=require('./config').getPORT(); require('http').get('http://127.0.0.1:'+p+'/health', r => { let d=''; r.on('data',c=>d+=c); r.on('end',()=>{ const j=JSON.parse(d); console.log('Health:', j.status); process.exit(j.status==='ok'?0:1); }); }).on('error',e=>{ console.error('Server unreachable:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.lint: node --input-type=module -e "import('./webServer.js').catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); })" 2>&1 || node --check webServer.js && node --check ebayClient.js && node --check geminiClient.js && node --check utils.js && node --check config.js && echo '✔ All files pass syntax check'
scripts.check-syntax: node --check webServer.js && node --check ebayClient.js && node --check geminiClient.js && node --check utils.js && node --check config.js && node --check crossPost.js && echo '✔ Syntax OK'
